children.value: On frozen active sets, use a Lagrangian with equality constraints:

children.html: Lk(y,u,p,λ−k,λ+k)=J(y,u)−⟨Ay−Bu−F,p⟩+(λ−k,u−umin⁡)A−k+(λ+k,u−umax⁡)A+k.\mathcal L_k(y,u,p,\lambda_-^k,\lambda_+^k) = J(y,u)-\langle Ay-Bu-F,p\rangle +(\lambda_-^k,u-u_{\min})_{\mathcal A_-^k} +(\lambda_+^k,u-u_{\max})_{\mathcal A_+^k}.Lk​(y,u,p,λ−k​,λ+k​)=J(y,u)−⟨Ay−Bu−F,p⟩+(λ−k​,u−umin​)A−k​​+(λ+k​,u−umax​)A+k​​.

children.value: PDAS = solve this equality-constrained KKT system, update the sets, repeat.
